# PowerScriptFormula.IsExpression property

`true` when [`Text`](./Text.md) is an arithmetic expression rather than a literal number (no [`LiteralValue`](./LiteralValue.md) available — needs Phase 2's evaluator). Detected structurally: the text contains non-numeric characters typical of expressions (`SF_`, operators, function calls).

```csharp
public bool IsExpression { get; }
```
